//: Lighthouse-CI assertions (SITE-04). SEO + accessibility + best-practices are GATED at firm thresholds — deterministic for Astro's static HTML, the reason Astro was chosen over a SPA (decision 34 D2). PERFORMANCE is collected + reported but NOT gated ("off"): a throttled perf score is environment-flaky and would create a stuck CI loop. Run against `astro preview` (honours `base`) — never `astro dev`. URLs are passed by the pinned treosh/lighthouse-ci-action in ci.yml; only the two INDEXABLE home pages are audited (the DRAFT legal pages are intentionally noindex, which correctly lowers their SEO score, so they are not gated).
